metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for the Tod Smith agent team — codifies the SecondBrain vault workflow and TodSmith-native runbooks for gh, fly.io, and sprites.dev.

plugins.name: todsmith-vault
plugins.description: How agents write to ~/.secondbrain: vault-commit.sh, frontmatter schema, daily-branch lifecycle, raw/ immutability.

plugins.name: todsmith-gh
plugins.description: GitHub CLI runbook for TodSmith: PRs, issues, Actions, rulesets. Placeholder — content forthcoming.

plugins.name: todsmith-fly
plugins.description: Fly.io runbook for the TodSmith deployment (machines, volumes, secrets, logs). Placeholder — content forthcoming.

plugins.name: todsmith-sprites-dev
plugins.description: sprites.dev runbook adapted for TodSmith conventions. Placeholder — content forthcoming.
